name: OpenFoodFacts
description: Look up food products by barcode or name — nutrition facts, Nutri-Score, allergens, ingredients (4M+ products, no API key needed)

tools.name: lookup_barcode
tools.description: Look up a food product by its barcode (EAN-8 or EAN-13)

tools.name: search_food
tools.description: Search for food products by name or keyword

author: freddy-schuetz
